headline: Why Northrup Grumman Stock Sank This Week
summary: Despite budget increases, the contractor is facing uncertainty about future profitability for innovative projects.

headline: Defense Stocks Selloff Deepens. The Sector Can Survive a ‘Blue Wave.’
summary: The selloff in defense stocks has gotten out of hand, according to Citi analyst John Godyn.  Coming into Friday trading, shares of  Lockheed Martin Northrop Grumman General Dynamics RTX  and  L3Harris Technologies  were down 14% since the Iran war started and 8% since Monday.  “In just a few weeks, the top-down narrative on defense stocks has completely flip-flopped,” wrote Godyn on Thursday.

headline: Defense Stocks Look Bulletproof, But The Bill Could Hit 2.6% Of GDP
summary: Defense stocks look bulletproof as military budgets rise, but widening deficits, higher debt and stubborn rates could turn the rearmament boom into a trap.
